raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase through XXXX and the merchandise was not delivered. The tracking showed it was not sent. I called the post office and they confirmed that the merchandise had not been sent. I opened a dilspute and was granted conditional credit but was later denied. I called the credit card rep and asked what the merchant provided as proof and I was never told. I was given a website to pursue trying to reverse the dispute dicision and I found this contact. Hope this helps
